T^T (2) CD <*) CO (5) , ryf^r strr f^ffa ^Tjffnr, ^r=r *rr ^ P 2. •41M4 ^ i R ^ * , M\<J\H I F T 5^r *rr %^fa *I<+K ^5FrFf%T, ^ r \w.ti. 11/8/2015-TTJT.3rrf. ] 3TTT. sftSTC^sPTC flf%^" MINISTRY OF MINES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th August, 2015 G.S.R.633(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section "9C of the Mines and Minerals (Development and Regulation) Act, 1957 (67 of 1957), the Central Government hereby establishes a Trust to be called as the National Mineral Exploration Trust with a Governing Body and an Executive Committee. (I) The Governing Body shall consist of the following members, namely:- (a) Union Minister In-charge of Ministry of Mines (b) Union Minister In-charge of Ministry of Coal or his nominee —Chairperson, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; -- 2 of 3 -- [*n*iii-^«s3(i)] flTOT ^ T W T W : 3TOT*TRni (c) Union Minister In-charge of Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas or his nominee (d) Minister of State for Atomic Energy or his nominee (e) Minister of State for Mines (f) Six Ministers of State Governments, holding charge of Mines and Geology to be nominated by the Chairperson of the Governing Body of the National Mineral Exploration Trust on rotation basis, for a term not exceeding two years at a time with the eligibility for re-nomination —Members, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; (g) Secretary, Ministry of Mines —Convener, ex officio. (h) Special invitees having experience in the relevant field to be invited by the Chairperson of the Governing Body of the National Mineral Exploration Trust. (II) The Executive Committee shall consist of the following members, namely:- (a) Secretary, Ministry of Mines (b) an officer not below the rank of Joint Secretary, Department of Atomic Energy (c) an officer not below the rank of Joint Secretary, Ministry of Coal Of-t-t/iar tint1 Ka1*-**if fViat m n l - *-»f* IV"***" Vo/*r**tnnr A/Wnfofrn* r*+~ Petroleum and Natural Gas (e) Joint Secretary and Financial Advisor of Ministries of Mines or Coal (f) Director General of Geological Survey of India or any other representative to be nominated by the Central Government (g) Controller General of Indian Bureau of Mines or any other representative to be nominated by the Central Government (h) One representative from any four State Governments, as decided by the Central Government, not below the rank'of Secretary to the State Government or equivalent, on rotation basis, for a term not exceeding two years at a time, with the eligibility for re-nomination (i) Joint Secretary, in-charge of Exploration, Ministry of Mines —Chairperson, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio: —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Member, ex officio; —Members, ex officio; —Member Secretary, ex officio; 2. (j) five persons, from among persons with experience in exploration or in research in a related field at least for a period of two years,, to be nominated by the Chairperson of the Executive Committee of the National Mineral Exploration Trust. This Notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No.ll/8/2015-M.I] R.SRIDHARAN, Addl.. Secy.
